name: Frosty Lime Sherbert
recipeInstructions:
1 In a medium bowl, dissolve gelatin in hot water. Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
2 Stir in milk, evaporated milk, lime juice, lime peel, and food coloring.
3 Pour mixture into an 8-inch square dish or 2 refrigerator trays.
4 Freeze for 2 to 3 hours, or until firm.
5 When completely frozen, break the sherbet into chunks with a wooden spoon and turn into a chilled bowl.
6 Beat with an electric mixer on high until fluffy and smooth. Return quickly to cold dish or trays and freeze firm.
7 Cover tightly with foil when frozen. Store in the freezer for several weeks.
8 Serve plain or with fruit.
9 Serves 6.
